requirement: Principles relating to processing of personal data (lawfulness fairness transparency purpose limitation data minimization accuracy storage limitation integrity)
verification_method: Review data processing principles in security policy

requirement: Lawfulness of processing - establish legal basis for each processing activity
verification_method: Review data processing justifications in PRD and constitution

requirement: Conditions for consent - demonstrate valid consent where consent is the legal basis
verification_method: Review consent flows in PRD and UX design

requirement: Transparent information communication and modalities for exercising data subject rights
verification_method: Review privacy notice and rights exercise UI

requirement: Information to be provided where personal data are collected from the data subject
Right of access by the data subject
Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
verification_method: Review data deletion capability in requirements and architecture

requirement: Data protection by design and by default
verification_method: Review privacy-by-design in architecture decisions and governance policies

requirement: Processor - define obligations when using data processors

verification_method: Review trace and audit trail configuration for processing records

requirement: Security of processing - implement appropriate technical and organizational measures
verification_method: Review security measures in constitution and architecture

requirement: Notification of personal data breach to supervisory authority
